prompt: Write 3 detailed case-study templates for openpatent.ai across the 3 highest-LTV verticals. Each case study must include: (1) Customer profile (industry, headcount, funding stage, location) — for verticals: (a) solo inventor, (b) Series A AI startup, (c) IP boutique law firm. (2) The problem in one paragraph (specific number: $X legal bill, Y days lost, Z knockoff units shipped). (3) The solution in one paragraph (which tier, which 6-layer elements were used, which jurisdictional framework applied). (4) The result in one paragraph (concrete number: cost saved, time-to-proof, dispute resolved, ROI multiplier). (5) A pull-quote. (6) A logo placeholder. Each case study ≤300 words. Use DEFONEOS mythic voice. Return ONLY JSON: {case_studies:[3 strings], signature:string}.
